CROSS DEFENDANT N.V. HEATHORN COMPANY Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross-Complaint.

N.V. Heathorn Co.'s motion for leave to file first amended cross-complaint is granted.
"That trial courts are to liberally permit such amendments, at any stage of the proceeding, has been established policy in this state since 1901." (Hirsa v. Sup. Ct. (1981) 118 Cal.App.3d 486, 488-89; see also CCP 428.50(c).) A proposed amended complaint's validity is not considered when deciding leave to amend. (See Kittredge Sports Co. v. Sup. Ct. (1989) 213 Cal.App.3d 1045, 1048.) The trial date in this case is July 29, 2024.
